semantic_sweep.review_note: Reviewed the complete chapter, all thirty exact mappings, trace fixtures, replay, blocked lineage, governed repository slice, the successor integrated transition model and independent consumer, all three proof targets, every current manifest atom and 71 prose candidates, tests, crosswalk, summary, and handoff. Made the Cross-Layer Trace Join Contract the distinct owner; preserved zero core effect; froze the natural independently operated multi-service matched-baseline campaign.

scope.population: Exact traces, runs, requests, intents, authorities, owner contracts, artifacts, parents, states, effects, receipts, evaluators, evidence, residuals, rollbacks, consumers, environments, and times.
scope.environment: Thirty mappings; one schema/fixture; three valid and six invalid trace fixtures; thirteen-artifact replay; blocked lineage plus eight mutations; nine-scenario/eight-attack disposable slice with baseline false accepts 8 versus governed 0, zero unsafe releases, three rollback attempts; finite invariants; sixteen declarations. No deployed services, natural workload, independent evaluator, reproduction, or transfer.
scope.model: Cross-Layer Trace Join Contract over owner-preserving handoffs, authority, identities, canonical state, material effects, receipts, evaluators, evidence, residuals, lifecycle, matched baselines, correction, rollback, monitoring, and expiry.
scope.authority: Owns cross-layer joinability only; every layer retains intent, planning, context, computation, evidence, runtime, artifact, data, evaluation, update, readiness, resource, governance, incident, release, and publication authority.
scope.time: Reviewed through 2026-07-15; material owner, interface, schema, authority, state, evaluator, dependency, threat, consumer, environment, or time changes expire joins.
scope.artifact: Chapter, manifest, thirty mappings, records, fixtures, replay, slice, invariant result, validators, three targets, sixteen declarations, review, and future campaign.

assumptions: Owners, authority, artifacts, canonical state, effects, receipts, evaluators, evidence, residuals, and rollback can be observed and versioned.
Interfaces, authority timing, evaluators, baselines, stopping, attacks, acceptance, and rollback can be frozen prospectively.
Strong baselines can receive matched models, tools, context, compute, tuning, and retries.
Independent implementers, operators, evaluators, institutions, infrastructures, and transfer sites can reproduce outcomes.
chapter_defaults.strongest_counterclaim: Trace contracts add overhead while hidden shared state, weak evaluators, and partial effects persist, yielding no unique semantic, recovery, safety, or usefulness advantage.
chapter_defaults.falsifier: Natural matched multi-service campaigns show no benefit, unacceptable overhead or false blocking, persistent join failures, ineffective rollback, or no independent reproduction and transfer.

required_lanes.necessity: Freeze architecture and external comparators without importing results.
Justify intent, authority, residual acceptance, correction, appeal, and terminal decisions.
Specify finite join properties without claiming deployed semantics.
Run independently operated services, effects, observers, evaluators, incidents, rollback, and correction.
Measure preservation, false accepts/blocks, usefulness, failures, latency, burden, residuals, and cost.
Ablate owner, authority, state, receipts, evaluators, evidence, residuals, and rollback.
Reproduce across models, tools, tasks, organizations, infrastructures, legal regimes, environments, and time.

contrary_evidence: The repository slice is disposable, hand-authored, internally operated and observed, and uses no language-model planning or generation.
Eight baseline false accepts versus zero governed are bounded to nine synthetic scenarios and eight named attacks.
Three rollback attempts do not establish effect-complete external rollback.
All sixteen declarations reduce hand-authored finite predicates, routes, or fixtures.
Thirty mappings include related local lineage and unreproduced source results.
known_confounds: Shared models, tools, stores, evaluators, operators, organizations, infrastructure, or analysis create hidden coupling.
Task difficulty, service quality, interface engineering, retries, budgets, and reviewer effort can dominate outcomes.
Outcome-aware schemas, evaluators, attacks, stopping, and discarded traces create selection bias.
A complete trace can encode false authority, state, effects, evaluation, evidence, or residuals.
acceptance_criteria: Bind exact request, owners, authority, parents, inputs/outputs, state, effect, receipt, evaluator, evidence, residuals, lifecycle, rollback, environment, and non-claims.
Run natural independently operated matched workloads with complete denominators and adversarial joins.
Effect-complete rollback restores all state, artifacts, projections, credentials, services, descendants, evidence, releases, notifications, and reliance or residualizes them.
Promotion survives causal ablation, independent reproduction, and heterogeneous transfer.
narrowing_criteria: Narrow to exact trace, owners, interfaces, models, tools, data, states, effects, evaluators, institutions, environments, and time.
Separate diagram, schema, fixture, replay, local execution, independent observation, reproduction, transfer, deployment, release, and SOTA states.
Unknown join semantics, authority, state, causality, evaluator, evidence, residual, lifecycle, rollback, cost, reproduction, or transfer remains blocked.
refutation_criteria: Refute joins with invalid authority, parentage, state, effect, receipt, evaluator, evidence, residual, lifecycle, acknowledgement, or rollback.
Refute benefit when matched baselines preserve outcomes or extra resources, selection, weak attacks, hidden failures, or costs explain gains.
Refute broad integration, safety, capability, deployment, transfer, AGI, ASI, or SOTA from diagrams, fixtures, proofs, replays, or disposable slices.
deprecation_criteria: Deprecate only after every trace, authority, artifact, state, effect, receipt, evaluator, evidence, residual, correction, rollback, and result migrates with lineage.

reproduction.command: python3 scripts/validate_reference_trace.py && python3 scripts/validate_reference_trace_replay.py && python3 scripts/validate_name_to_effect_trace.py && python3 scripts/validate_governed_repository_change_slice.py && python3 scripts/validate_governed_trace_invariants.py && cd lean && lake build AsiStackProofs.ReferenceArchitecture AsiStackProofs.IntegratedReferenceTrace
reproduction.environment_lock: Local fixtures, replay, disposable slice, invariant extraction, validators, and modules current through 2026-07-15; natural campaign not run.
reproduction.evaluator_identity: Repository-local; independent implementers, operators, evaluators, institutions, infrastructures, and transfer sites required.

residual.next_unblocking_condition: Run natural independently operated multi-service workloads against matched baselines with semantic, authority, state/effect, receipt, evaluator, evidence, residual, lifecycle, rollback, correction, outcome, cost, reproduction, and transfer measures.

non_claims: No diagram, interface, projection, replay, fixture, theorem, build, mapping, or disposable slice establishes whole-stack execution, safety, capability, deployment, transfer, AGI, ASI, or SOTA.
No deployed multi-service runtime, natural workload, independent evaluator, external reproduction, or transfer exists.
The argument-exit campaign is future work, not a result.

integrated-reference-architecture.core.strongest_counterclaim: Trace joins are overhead without unique semantic, recovery, safety, or usefulness value.
integrated-reference-architecture.core.falsifier: Natural matched services show no benefit, unacceptable overhead, persistent join failures, ineffective rollback, or no reproduction/transfer.

integrated-reference-architecture.prose..rationale: Restates the joined-trace obligation to preserve route-changing residuals.
Explicit ceiling on what a finite human control-envelope packet can establish.
Joined-trace identity list elaborates the existing Cross-Layer Trace Join Contract.
Rejected-route and terminal-custody continuation specializes existing join and lifecycle atoms.

The local slice is disposable and internally evaluated.
The argument-exit campaign is not current evidence.
